Interface RoomService

All Known Implementing Classes:
JdbcRoomService, MockRoomService
public interface RoomService
Defines operations for managing rooms and devices within the smart-home system.

The implementation is expected to provide an ObservableList view for UI binding and to persist changes to the configured data store (e.g. JDBC).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Device

    Adds a new device to the specified room.

    Deletes a room and all associated devices.

    Returns all devices across all rooms.
    Device

    Finds a device by its identifier.
    Device
    getDeviceByName(String deviceName)
    Finds a device by its display name.
    Room

    Finds a room by its identifier.

    Returns all rooms currently managed by the service.
    boolean

    Removes a device from the specified room.

    Renames a device within a room.

    updateDeviceBrightness(String deviceId, int brightness)
    Updates the brightness of a dimmer device and persists the change.
    boolean

    Updates the on/off state of a device and persists the change.
    boolean
    updateDeviceTemperature(String deviceId, double temperature)
    Updates the temperature or sensor reading of a device and persists the change.
    boolean
    updateRoomName(String roomId, String newName)
    Updates the name of an existing room.

  • Method Details

    • getRooms

      javafx.collections.ObservableList<Room> getRooms()
      Returns all rooms currently managed by the service.
      Returns:
      observable list of rooms

    • getRoomById

      Room getRoomById(String roomId)
      Finds a room by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      roomId - unique room identifier
      Returns:
      matching room, or null when none exists

    • addRoom

      Room addRoom(String name)
      Creates and stores a new room.
      Parameters:
      name - display name of the room
      Returns:
      created room

    • updateRoomName

      boolean updateRoomName(String roomId, String newName)
      Updates the name of an existing room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room to update
      newName - new display name
      Returns:
      true when the room was updated, otherwise false

    • deleteRoom

      boolean deleteRoom(String roomId)
      Deletes a room and all associated devices.
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room to delete
      Returns:
      true when the room existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • getAllDevices

      javafx.collections.ObservableList<Device> getAllDevices()
      Returns all devices across all rooms.
      Returns:
      observable list of devices

    • getDeviceById

      Device getDeviceById(String deviceId)
      Finds a device by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      Returns:
      matching device, or null when none exists

    • getDeviceByName

      Device getDeviceByName(String deviceName)
      Finds a device by its display name.
      Parameters:
      deviceName - device display name
      Returns:
      matching device, or null when none exists

    • addDeviceToRoom

      Device addDeviceToRoom(String roomId, String deviceName, String deviceType)
      Adds a new device to the specified room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room
      deviceName - display name for the device
      deviceType - device type (e.g. SWITCH, DIMMER, THERMOSTAT, SENSOR, BLIND)
      Returns:
      created device

    • removeDeviceFromRoom

      boolean removeDeviceFromRoom(String roomId, String deviceId)
      Removes a device from the specified room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room
      deviceId - identifier of the device to remove
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was removed, otherwise false

    • renameDevice

      boolean renameDevice(String roomId, String deviceId, String newName)
      Renames a device within a room.
      Parameters:
      roomId - identifier of the room
      deviceId - identifier of the device to rename
      newName - new display name for the device
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceState

      boolean updateDeviceState(String deviceId, boolean state)
      Updates the on/off state of a device and persists the change.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      state - new power state
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceBrightness

      boolean updateDeviceBrightness(String deviceId, int brightness)
      Updates the brightness of a dimmer device and persists the change. Also sets state to true when brightness > 0, and false when brightness == 0.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      brightness - brightness level 0–100
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false

    • updateDeviceTemperature

      boolean updateDeviceTemperature(String deviceId, double temperature)
      Updates the temperature or sensor reading of a device and persists the change.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - unique device identifier
      temperature - new temperature or sensor value
      Returns:
      true when the device existed and was updated, otherwise false
